shared_properties: 32x48 body scale with curved horn tips and a teal inner core.
Silhouette remains readable against shadow tiles and bright beam overlays.
differences: Eight frames add longer stride arcs and a trailing arm sweep for motion clarity.
Inner glow stretches backward 3 px during the contact-to-push sequence.
Knee lift rises higher on the passing frame to support gap timing.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Reuse the player atlas pipeline and switch to this run state through PlayerStateSprite when horizontal speed is non-zero.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_run_8f_12fps.png through AssetServer before movement systems start.
runtime_notes: Run frames keep the same origin as the idle loop to avoid collider drift.
Leg spread remains readable at 12 fps.
Glow smear stays inside a 4 px trailing margin.

context.usage: Primary traversal loop for moving between shadow pockets and approaching interactables.

shape.silhouette: Running Umbra with extended lead leg, trailing arm sweep, and a compressed torso on contact frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x48 px with eight 32x48 frames.
Run cycle communicates left-to-right travel with no ambiguous contact frame.
Head and horn silhouette never clip outside the 32 px frame width.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Art deco tower skyline, twilight palette, gold trim rhythm, and layered silhouette depth anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra body proportions, horn silhouette, limb taper, and exposure glow anchor.
